title: Thrixspermum complanatum
taxonomy: Thrixspermum complanatum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family is the largest and most diverse group of flowering plants. The genus Thrixspermum is part of the subfamily Apostasioideae, which is one of the most ancient lineages within the Orchidaceae family. Thrixspermum complanatum is classified as a terrestrial orchid, with its roots anchored in the soil and its leaves adapted to absorb moisture and nutrients.
